name: clearideas-codex
description: Bring Clear Ideas into Codex for governed knowledge, cited answers, and agent authoring.

interface.shortDescription: Secure knowledge, cited answers, and agent authoring
interface.longDescription: Use Clear Ideas in Codex to search approved content, retrieve cited answers from governed knowledge, and create, edit, validate, run, and schedule repeatable agents backed by your Clear Ideas environment.
